app.name: SplashSphere Connect
app.tagline: Book your car wash in seconds

phoneStep.title: Sign in with your phone
phoneStep.subtitle: We'll text you a one-time code. No passwords, no hassle.
phoneStep.phoneHint: Philippine mobile number (11 digits starting with 09).
phoneStep.errorInvalid: Enter a valid PH mobile number (09XXXXXXXXX).
phoneStep.errorRateLimit: Please wait a minute before requesting another code.
phoneStep.errorDailyLimit: Daily limit reached. Try again tomorrow.
phoneStep.errorGeneric: We couldn't send a code. Please try again.

codeStep.title: Enter the 6-digit code
codeStep.subtitle: We sent a code to {phone}.
codeStep.devHint: Dev mode: using fixed OTP code.
codeStep.errorWrongCode: That code is incorrect or expired.
codeStep.errorGeneric: We couldn't verify that code. Please try again.

myCarWashes.title: My car washes
myCarWashes.error: We couldn't load your car washes. Please try again.

profile.loadError: We couldn't load your profile. Please try again.

edit.title: Edit profile
edit.errorGeneric: We couldn't save your changes. Please try again.

vehicles.title: My vehicles
vehicles.emptyHint: Add a vehicle so cashiers can find you faster on arrival.
vehicles.classificationHint: Type/size set by cashier on first visit
vehicles.deleteError: We couldn't remove that vehicle. Please try again.

vehicleForm.errorGeneric: We couldn't save this vehicle. Please try again.

discover.title: Find a car wash
discover.subtitle: Browse SplashSphere-powered washes near you
discover.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, branch, or address
discover.heroTitle: Search for a car wash near you
discover.heroSubtitle: Type a name, city, or branch to get started.
discover.emptySubtitle: Try a different search term or check your spelling.
discover.locatingHint: Using your location to sort by distance
discover.locationDenied: Location turned off — showing results alphabetically

carwash.loadError: We couldn't load this car wash.
carwash.notFound: This car wash is no longer available.
carwash.joinError: We couldn't join this car wash. Please try again.

vehicle.title: Pick a vehicle
vehicle.subtitle: Choose which car you'll bring in.
vehicle.emptyHint: Add a vehicle to your profile first — cashiers use it to speed up check-in.

services.title: Pick your services
services.subtitle: Choose one or more services for this wash.
services.unclassifiedBanner: Final price confirmed when your vehicle is assessed on your first visit.
services.empty: No services available for this vehicle.
services.loadError: We couldn't load this car wash's services.

schedule.title: Pick a time
schedule.subtitle: Choose a branch, date, and time slot.
schedule.noBookableBranches: No branches at this car wash take online bookings yet.
schedule.pickBranchFirst: Pick a branch to see available dates.
schedule.pickBranchAndDate: Pick a branch and date to see available times.
schedule.noSlots: No slots left on this date. Try another day.

confirm.title: Review your booking
confirm.subtitle: One last look before we reserve your slot.
confirm.policy: You'll get a confirmation over SMS and push. If you're not at the branch within 15 minutes of your slot, we'll mark your booking as a no-show.

errors.submitGeneric: We couldn't create that booking. Please try again.

detail.unclassifiedHint: Final price confirmed when your vehicle is assessed on arrival.
detail.notFound: This booking is no longer available.

queue.title: Live queue
queue.aheadOfYou: {count, plural, =0 {You're up next} =1 {1 ahead of you} other {# ahead of you}}
queue.inactive: Your queue position will show here once you arrive.

actions.confirmCancelBody: You can rebook anytime, but your slot will be given up.
actions.cancelError: We couldn't cancel that booking. Please try again.

membership.title: Membership
membership.topTier: You've reached our top tier — enjoy the perks!

notEnrolled.title: Loyalty not yet unlocked
notEnrolled.body: Complete a wash at this car wash to start earning points toward rewards.

rewards.title: Rewards
rewards.empty: No rewards listed yet. Check back soon.
rewards.confirmBody: This will deduct {points} points for "{name}". You'll get a code to show the cashier.
rewards.redeemError: We couldn't redeem that reward. Please try again.
rewards.showCashier: Show this code to the cashier

referral.title: Invite friends, earn points
referral.subtitle: Share your code — both of you get bonus points when they finish their first wash.
referral.shareTitle: Try this car wash with me
referral.shareText: Join me at {tenant} and use code {code} to get bonus loyalty points on your first wash!
referral.unavailable: This car wash doesn't offer a referral program yet.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.body: Share your code with a friend. You earn {referrerPoints} points and they earn {referredPoints} points once they complete their first wash.
